# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary architecture and analysis artifacts generated during assessment.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - Application and component-level architecture diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - External dependency inventory and categorized dependency map.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - API endpoint inventory and service communication contracts.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Data layer, persistence boundaries, and entity relationships.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, properties, and secrets inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Core business workflows and end-to-end sequence diagrams.
